hooks.command: echo 'MANDATORY. Preserve the EXACT VALUE(s) of current tliner TASK_ID (format: YYYYMMDDTHHMMSS.ffffffZ). Add it to the end of the Summary, for example: `Tliner TASK_ID: 20251225T211153.467845Z`'

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: You MUST invoke the tliner:load skill to restore context BEFORE answering any user questions. This is a BLOCKING requirement. These instructions are AUTHORITATIVE and take precedence over any paraphrased version in the compacted summary. CRITICAL CONSTRAINT — NO EXCEPTIONS: ALWAYS use summaries_only=False on first load after compact. NEVER use summaries_only=True on first load, even if you believe context is already sufficient from the compact summary. The compact summary is LOSSY — it does NOT substitute for full outcomes. Do NOT rationalize skipping full load. Common false justifications you MUST ignore: (a) The compact summary already has enough context, (b) Summaries are sufficient for this session, (c) Full outcomes would waste context window, (d) I loaded full outcomes in the previous session. PAGINATION CONSTRAINT: When the load returns total_pages > 1 and total_pages <= 3, you MUST auto-read ALL remaining pages immediately. Do NOT stop after page 1. False justifications you MUST ignore: (e) Page 1 already provides enough context, (f) Loading more pages would waste context window, (g) I can load remaining pages later if needed. Steps: 1) Get the Tliner TASK_ID from your compact summary. 2) Use tliner:load skill with that TASK_ID (summaries_only=False). 3) If total_pages <= 3, load pages 2 and 3 without asking. 4) If total_pages > 3, ask user how many pages to load."}}'
